summary: Re-verified Pay Balance fix on /dashboard for iteration 7. Both requested scenarios PASS.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pay Balance flow on /dashboard confirmed working. Scenario 1 (with champagne extra added): balance-due=$0, balance-extras=$0, 'Paid in full · nothing due' visible, pay-balance-btn disabled. Scenario 2 (default $45 extra, no additions): balance-due=$0. Fix `setStay(s => ({...s, paid: s.grand})); setExtras([]);` in /app/frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.jsx works correctly. Note: extras modal does NOT close via Escape key — must click 'Done' button; not a bug but worth noting.
